observations.text: Terminal states enforced via empty sets in the transition map rather than special-case logic — elegant and correct
Exhaustive terminal state testing: all 5 possible target states tested from both CANCELLED and DELIVERED
InvalidTransitionError extends Error with readonly code property — satisfies both the spec and enables instanceof checks
24 tests is thorough coverage for a 5-state machine, including error shape assertions (instanceof, code, message)
CONFIRMED -> CANCELLED path explicitly included — avoids the common miss noted in failure modes
